x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: MID Servers are required for AI Agent-triggered discovery, external integrations, and on-premise system connectivity. Missing MID Servers create gaps in AI Agent action coverage for hybrid infrastructure.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Deploy MID Servers for each network zone requiring AI Agent access. Validate MID Servers via ecc_agent_list.do. Upgrade MID Servers to match the instance version. AI Agents fail silently when required MID Servers are unavailable.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_c3f85dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c16
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[MID Servers are required for AI Agent-triggered discovery, external integrations, and on-premise system connectivity. Missing MID Servers create gaps in AI Agent action coverage for hybrid infrastructure.]]></ai_justification><check_name>MID Server Availability</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(){
var gr=new GlideRecord("ecc_agent");
gr.addQuery("status","Up");
gr.query();
var up=gr.getRowCount();
var gr2=new GlideRecord("ecc_agent");
gr2.query();
var total=gr2.getRowCount();
return{status:up>=1?"ready":"needs_attention",actualValue:total+" MID Servers | "+up+" Up",finding:up<1?"No MID Servers are Up. AI Agent-triggered discovery probes and on-premise integrations will fail without available MID Servers.":""+up+" MID Servers are Up and available for AI Agent execution."};
})()]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>PLATFORM</module><number>CHK0000487</number><order>80</order><remediation_guidance>Deploy MID Servers for each network zone requiring AI Agent access. Validate MID Servers via ecc_agent_list.do. Upgrade MID Servers to match the instance version. AI Agents fail silently when required MID Servers are unavailable.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:20</sys_created_on><sys_id>c3f85dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c16</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>MID Server Availability</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_c3f85dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c16</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:02</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
